title: Squirrel Removal Port Chester, NY | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Port Chester, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Serving homes near Capitol Theatre & Lyon Park. Call today!
intro: Port Chester residents dealing with squirrels in attics, walls, or chimneys need fast, humane removal solutions. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Port Chester, from historic downtown buildings to residential neighborhoods near the Connecticut border. Our experienced technicians safely remove squirrels and prevent future infestations with guaranteed exclusion work.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife control experience to Port Chester, combining humane removal methods with thorough property inspections and permanent exclusion solutions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Westchester properties and provide same-day emergency services with transparent pricing and long-term warranties.
localContext: Port Chester's mature tree-lined streets and mix of century-old homes and modern residences create ideal conditions for squirrel activity, especially near Lyon Park and the waterfront areas along the Byram River. The village's proximity to wooded areas and diverse architecture—from Victorian homes to apartment complexes near the Metro-North station—means squirrels frequently seek shelter in attics, soffits, and chimneys during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Port Chester?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Port Chester typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. This includes humane trapping, entry point sealing, and attic inspection. We provide free estimates with transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a squirrel problem in Port Chester?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Port Chester and surrounding Westchester areas. Squirrel problems often require urgent attention, especially if they're in living spaces or causing damage, so we prioritize emergency calls and can typically arrive within 24 hours of your initial contact.

faqs.question: What methods do you use for squirrel removal in Port Chester homes?
faqs.answer: We use humane, proven methods including live trapping, one-way exclusion doors, and complete entry point sealing. After removing all squirrels, we seal entry points with heavy-duty materials, install protective barriers on vulnerable areas, and provide attic cleanup and sanitization if needed. All methods comply with New York wildlife regulations.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees on squirrel exclusion work in Port Chester?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide warranties on all exclusion work, typically ranging from 1-2 years depending on the service package. If squirrels re-enter through our sealed areas during the warranty period, we'll return to fix the problem at no additional charge. We also offer ongoing maintenance plans to ensure long-term protection for your Port Chester property.
